banner.stallBody: We've noticed you've been stuck for a while. A navigator can help you find the next step.

hero.title: What's standing between you and a job?
hero.subtitle: MontGoWork is a workforce navigator that helps you overcome barriers and find your path to employment.

home.heroQuestion: What's standing between you and a job?
home.heroBlurb: MontGoWork is a workforce navigator that helps you overcome barriers and find your path to employment.
home.stepAssessDesc: Answer a few questions about your situation, barriers, and work history
home.stepMatchDesc: We match you with jobs, resources, and transit routes in your area
home.stepPlanDesc: Get a personalized action plan: what to do Monday morning
home.bottomCtaBody: It takes about 2 minutes. No account needed.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Answer a few questions about your situation, barriers, and work history
howItWorks.step2Desc: We match you with jobs, resources, and transit routes in your area
howItWorks.step3Desc: Get a personalized action plan: what to do Monday morning

assess.heading: Workforce Assessment
assess.workHistoryPlaceholder: Tell us about your work experience...
assess.resumeDesc: Upload a resume to improve your job matches. This step is optional.
assess.barriersDesc: Choose all that apply. We'll match you with resources and jobs that work around these.
assess.barriersMinOne: Select at least one barrier to continue.
assess.recordDesc: Help us find fair-chance employers and check expungement eligibility. All fields are optional -- skip if you prefer.
assess.benefitsDesc: Tell us about your household and any benefits you receive. This helps us show how a new job might affect your benefits. You can skip this step.
assess.scheduleDesc: Let us know your availability so we can match you with the right shifts and transit options.
assess.industriesDesc: Select industries you're interested in. This helps us find better job matches.
assess.creditDesc: Help us understand your credit situation. This stays private and helps us match you with the right resources.
assess.navDesc: Answer a few questions to get your personalized re-entry plan
assess.privacyBadge: We don't store your identity. No login. No tracking. Your data stays on your device.
assess.errorSubmit: Something went wrong submitting your assessment. Please try again.
assess.errorCredit: Credit check could not be completed. Continuing without credit data.

plan.heading: Your Action Plan
plan.noCliff: No significant benefits cliff detected at any wage level.
plan.noRecovery: Net income does not fully recover within the analyzed wage range.
plan.errorNotFound: Session not found. It may have expired.
plan.errorGeneric: Something went wrong loading your plan. Please try again.
plan.errorFallback: Something went wrong loading your plan.
plan.matchesEmptyDesc: We're still looking for the best matches for your profile. Check back soon or update your assessment.
plan.whatsNextDownloadStrong: Download your Career Center Ready Package
plan.whatsNextDownloadDesc: using the button in Step 1 above.
plan.whatsNextAskCaseManagerDesc: and show them your Career Center Ready Package.

credit.heading: Credit Assessment
credit.encouragement: You're taking a great step by understanding your credit. Knowledge is the first step to improvement.

cliffSimulator.heading: Benefit Cliff Simulator
cliffSimulator.description: Drag the slider to see how your benefits change as your hourly wage increases.

resourceMap.heading: Community Resources Near You
resourceMap.description: Resources and services available in your area
resourceMap.noResources: No resources found for this area.

share.heading: Shared Action Plan
share.expiredOrInvalid: This shared plan link has expired or is invalid.

sequence.heading: Barrier Resolution Order
sequence.description: Resolve barriers in this order to maximize cascading benefits
sequence.noBarriers: No barriers identified -- you are ready to move forward!

simulator.heading: What Happens If...?
simulator.description: Toggle barriers to see the cascading effect on your job matches and benefits
simulator.summarySentence: Resolving these barriers unlocks more jobs and benefits.

voice.unsupported: Voice input not supported in this browser. Try Chrome or Edge.

jobs.title: Jobs Tracker
jobs.subtitle: Track applications from draft to offer
jobs.missingSession: No session available. Start an assessment first.
jobs.emptyBoard: No applications yet. Apply to a match to start tracking.
jobs.dragInstructions: Drag a card to a new column to change its status. Keyboard users: focus a card, press space, use arrow keys, press space again to drop.
jobs.transitionFailed: Could not update status. Try again.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.subtitle: Schedule and track your upcoming commitments
appointments.missingSession: No session available. Start an assessment first.
appointments.emptyList: No upcoming appointments in the next 30 days.
appointments.errorEndsBeforeStart: End time must be after start time

error.generic: Couldn't load your digest. Please try again.
error.unauthorized: Session expired. Please log in again.

documents.resumeSubtitle: Generate a tailored resume and download it as PDF.
documents.coverLetterSubtitle: Write a cover letter for a specific job application.
documents.missingSession: No session available. Start an assessment first.
documents.targetJobPlaceholder: Paste a job description to tailor your resume. Leave empty for a general resume.
documents.generateError: Could not generate the resume. Please try again.
documents.generateCoverError: Could not generate the cover letter. Please try again.
documents.previewEmpty: Generate a resume to see the preview here.
documents.previewEmptyCover: Generate a cover letter to see the preview here.
documents.resumeVersionEmpty: Generate a resume first, then come back to create a cover letter.

advisor.inboxDescription: Workers who submitted outcomes but have gone quiet. Reach out with a personal note or review their session detail.
advisor.emptyState: No sessions need attention in your city right now.
advisor.noteDialogDescription: This message will be emailed to the worker through the reminder engine. Limited to 3 notes per hour.
advisor.notePlaceholder: Hey — checking in. Give me a call when you can.
advisor.noteRateLimited: Rate limit hit: too many notes in the past hour. Try again later.
advisor.noteForbidden: Access denied for this session — it is not in your city.
advisor.noteGenericError: We could not send that note. Please try again.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.counselNotice: Hackathon-grade placeholder — this policy was authored fresh for the MontGoWork submission and has not been reviewed by counsel. Production rollout requires legal review.
privacy.esPlaceholder: (Spanish-only placeholder string; never rendered when locale is English.)

collect.heading: What we collect
collect.intro: We collect only what we need to run the service. Specifically:

processors.heading: Third-party processors
processors.intro: We use a small set of vendors to deliver the service. They process data on our behalf (they are processors, not controllers) and are contractually bound to use it only for the purpose described.

rights.heading: Your rights
rights.intro: You have the right to see, correct, and delete the data we hold about you, plus the right to know what we have. Each right has a one-click action in the app:

terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.counselNotice: Hackathon-grade placeholder — these terms were authored fresh for the MontGoWork submission and have not been reviewed by counsel. Production rollout requires legal review.
terms.esPlaceholder: (Spanish-only placeholder string; never rendered when locale is English.)

404.title: Page not found
404.body: The page you were looking for doesn't exist or has moved. Let's get you back on track.

500.title: Something went wrong
500.body: We hit an unexpected snag. The request was logged and our team will take a look. You can try again or head back home.
